feat.name: Peerless Warden
feat.text: Your mastery of primal magic has given you access to the greatest secrets of warden magic. You gain your choice of one warden spell from the peerless warden spells (or another you have access to).

traits.name: Ranger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the ranger class.

feat.special: You can take this feat multiple times, choosing a different peerless warden spell each time.
